name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Mini Bucket Shoulder Bag. This mini bucket shoulder bag is crafted from brown leather. This accessory features a hook closure, with a webbed shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality and modernity. Brown leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbed shoulder strap, cotton-linen blend lining, zip pocket, with Gucci logo zip pull, shoulder strap (42cm high) hook closure.
name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Mini Bucket Shoulder Bag. This mini bucket shoulder bag is crafted from brown leather. Brown leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbed shoulder strap, cotton-linen blend lining, zip pocket, with Gucci logo zip pull, shoulder strap (42cm high) hook closure.
Model: 782908.
Dimensions: 18.5(L) x 20.5(W) x 12.5cm(D)
Color: Brown/Original leather.
Italian creation
Model height 177cm
Weight: approx. 0.450kg
